# YAML Frontmatter Preview

This showcase exists to make Markdown metadata rendering easy to inspect.

- Property keys should stay in the foreground.
- Strings should use the Dracula string color.
- Booleans should read like YAML scalars rather than plain prose.

```yaml
palette:
  accent: "#ff79c6"
  foreground: "#f8f8f2"
```
